creator: nospam@ofloo.net
text:
I'm sorry but I still got this issue installing ircd-hybrid from pkg tree today.

pkg info ircd-hybrid
ircd-hybrid-8.2.40
Name           : ircd-hybrid
Version        : 8.2.40
Installed on   : Sat Jul 16 16:10:16 2022 CEST
Origin         : irc/ircd-hybrid
Architecture   : FreeBSD:13:amd64
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : irc
Licenses       : GPLv2
Maintainer     : fox@FreeBSD.org
WWW            : http://www.ircd-hybrid.org/
Comment        : Fast irc daemon with a number of new features

FreeBSD: {
  url: "pkg+http://pkg.FreeBSD.org/${ABI}/latest",
  mirror_type: "srv",
  signature_type: "fingerprints",
  fingerprints: "/usr/share/keys/pkg",
  enabled: yes
}

# uname -a
FreeBSD link 13.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE releng/13.1-n250148-fc952ac2212 GENERIC amd64
